Video.summary: TFH celebrates Alfred Hitchcock and the masterful storytelling that still keeps audiences on the edge of their seats.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These women play for keeps in the darkest alleys of noir cinema.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From smoldering glances to deadly betrayals, these thrillers show just how far desire can push the human heart.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: When horror wears an alluring face, loyalties blur and desire becomes the deadliest curse of all.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fatale Femmes Vol. 3: Daughters of Darkness
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: When “Boxcar Bertha” and “Bloody Mama” took a trip to “Hollywood Boulevard,” they told some car thieves to “Eat My Dust,” and drove off like they were extras in “Death Race 2000.”
Video.title: The Corman Cinematic Universe

Video.summary: A high-octane collection of tough-as-nails action flicks featuring iconic heroes, explosive chases, and unforgettable showdowns.
Video.grandparentTitle: ACTION!!! Vol. 6: Bold Movies and Big Attitude
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From frozen fights to winter warfare, it's a blizzard of bone-chilling big screen action hits!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These are the films that made Bruce Lee the greatest martial artist in Hollywood history.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Bullitt to Bad Lieutenant, filmmakers discuss cops that kick ass on the big screen.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From the past to the future, laying down the law comes easy to these big screen cops!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Step inside a world of streetwise anti-heroes, rebels, and genre-defining Black filmmakers who did things their own way.
Video.grandparentTitle: Street Kings: Icons, Outlaws, and Originals
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: No kids, we are not in Narnia. Let’s go to the “Little Shop of Horrors” and have a drink with “The Wild Angels.”
Video.title: The Chronicles of Corman

Video.summary: In this TFH exclusive, director Allan Arkush takes you inside cult classic The Final Comedown (a.k.a. Blast).
Video.title: The Final Comedown with Allan Arkush

Image.alt: The Final Comedown with Allan Arkush
The Final Comedown with Allan Arkush

Video.summary: Renegade martial arts warrior Sonny Chiba takes on the mob, the cops, and more in this sequel to The Street Fighter.
Video.title: The Return of the Street Fighter

Image.alt: The Return of the Street Fighter
The Return of the Street Fighter

Video.summary: Enter the “36th Chamber of the Shaolin” to a world of fast flying fists of fury!
Video.title: Fists of Legend

Video.summary: Director and storyteller Mick Garris shares his personal film favorites and the stories behind them.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: While “The Raven” may fly high, others less fortunate are subject to a “Premature Burial” inside “The Tomb of Ligeia”
Video.title: Corman, Price and Poe

Video.summary: Director Ti West hosts a thrilling lineup of genre-bending horror, action-packed adventures, mysteries, and more!
Video.grandparentTitle: Chills and Thrills with Ti West
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Shaft to Coffy to Truck Turner and more, celebrating the best action films of the Blaxploitation genre.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Take a high-octane ride through director Jonathan Kaplan's world of renegades, road warriors, and the rough edges of the 1970s.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hard Turns and Hard Times: The Films of Jonathan Kaplan
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Two masters of horror bring your nightmares to the big screen in this spine-chilling collection.
Video.grandparentTitle: Terror Titans: The Films of Wes Craven and John Carpenter
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From 'Haunted Hill' to Corman classics, Vincent Price sent shivers down the spines of horror fans for decades.
Video.grandparentTitle: Vincent Price: Master of the Silver Scream
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Sonny Chiba stars as a mercenary martial arts master who must protect an oil tycoon’s daughter from an army of murderous thugs.
Video.title: The Street Fighter

Video.summary: Lola Falana stars as a mob moll who finds herself in the crosshairs of killers when she agrees to testify against her boyfriend.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Director Eli Roth presents a wild ride through cult horror, shocking exploitation, and vintage sci-fi.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From spine-chilling thrills to edge-of-your-seat suspense, filmmaker Katt Shea talks her favorite films.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: TFH creator Joe Dante celebrates the noir classics that explore themes of identity, paranoia, and duality.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A gripping collection of noir classics, where crime, corruption, and fate collide on the big screen.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hardboiled & Haunted: The Art of Noir Cinema
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Near the end of the Cold War, mercenary Brandon Lee must rescue a brilliant laser scientist from KGB villains.
Video.title: Laser Mission

Video.summary: In this noir classic, Edmond O’Brien stars as Frank Bigelow, an accountant who unknowingly swallows deadly toxin and is given days to live. Determined to find out who did it, and why, Frank begins to put the pieces together. But will he find his killer before it’s too late?
Video.title: D.O.A.

Video.summary: Your favorite filmmakers pull their favorite noir films out of the shadows.
Video.title: Film Noir: The Dark Corner of Cinema

Image.alt: Film Noir: The Dark Corner of Cinema
Film Noir: The Dark Corner of Cinema
Film Noir: The Dark Corner of Cinema
